# host_group (Resource)

Manages one local host group.

Use this resource for groups that should exist before a `host_user` resource assigns membership. Built-in OS groups such as `admin`, `wheel`, or `staff` can be referenced by literal name without declaring a `host_group` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_group" "developers" {
  name = "developers"
}
```

## Import

Import an existing group by local group name:

```shell
terraform import host_group.developers developers
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Local group name.

### Read-Only

- `gid` (String) Numeric group ID as reported by the operating system.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `name`.
